ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2000-01) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Salt Lake GOLDEN EAGLES) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays (e.g., AHL) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., Salt Lake) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Goalie, Forward) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'1") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "overtime_losses" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses */,
  "shots_against" INTEGER /* Total shots against */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals against */,
  "goals_against_average" REAL /* Goals against average (GAA) */,
  "save_percentage" REAL /* Save percentage (Sv%) */,
  "shutouts" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Time on ice (TOI) in minutes:seconds */,
  "first_star" INTEGER /* Number of times recognized as 1st star */,
  "second_star" INTEGER /* Number of times recognized as 2nd star */,
  "third_star" INTEGER /* Number of times recognized as 3rd star */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power-play goals scored */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals scored */,
  "game_tying_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-tying goals scored */,
  "game_winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-winning goals scored */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the game was home or away */,
  "score_for" INTEGER /* Score for the team */,
  "score_against" INTEGER /* Score against the team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Overtime Loss) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the game went into overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the game went into a shootout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_players" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star recognition */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player recognized */,
  "star_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the star recognition (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_star_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_star_players_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Goal, Penalty, Hit) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event (in minutes:seconds) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., Concussion, Broken Bone) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Trade, Signing) */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
